metadata.description: A personal collection of Claude plugins built by Payman Salimi.

plugins.name: nutrition-coach
plugins.description: A personal nutrition coach: weekly meal plans, macro and calorie targets, grocery lists, and recipe walkthroughs across multiple cuisines (Mediterranean, Persian, Indian, Asian, Italian) with options for families with children, elderly household members, and quick-prep weeknight cooking.

plugins.name: elite-coach
plugins.description: A complete personal training and strength-and-conditioning coach: runs intake (PAR-Q, health history, training history, equipment, goals), designs progressive weekly programs with markdown plans and Excel trackers, and runs weekly check-ins to push, hold, regress, or deload. Specialty skills cover beginners, elite athletes, older adults, pregnancy/postpartum, post-knee-surgery, common injuries, certified trainers, hypertrophy, fat loss, maintenance, body recomposition, functional training, and plateau detection.
